title: abutilon obtusum
intro: Abutilon obtusum, also known as Indian mallow, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae) and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Abutilon obtusum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in the form of powders or extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
